Container.Name: homescreen-hero
Container.Overview: Plex companion app for users who want more control over how their libraries feel, not just how they're stored. It brings together collection management, automation, personalization, and server tools in one self-hosted app, all so that you get to choose what appears, when it appears, and who sees it. Wanna see it in action first? Check out the demo! https://demo.homescreenhero.com More info on features, installation, and general documenation can be found at https://docs.homescreenhero.com/

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for accessing the web interface

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Directory for config.yaml, database, and logs

Config.Name: Plex Token
Config.Description: Your Plex authentication token (required - find at: https://support.plex.tv/articles/204059436-finding-an-authentication-token-x-plex-token/)

Config.Name: Auth Password
Config.Description: Password for web UI authentication (optional but recommended)

Config.Name: Auth Secret Key
Config.Description: JWT secret key for authentication (use website or generate with: openssl rand -hex 32)

Config.Name: Trakt Client ID
Config.Description: Trakt API client ID for third-party list integration (optional - get at: https://trakt.tv/oauth/applications)

Config.Name: MDBList API Key
Config.Description: MDBList API key for third-party list integration (optional - get at: https://mdblist.com/preferences/)

Config.Name: TMDB API Key
Config.Description: TMDB API key for third-party list integration (optional - get at: https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api)

Config.Name: MAL Client ID
Config.Description: MyAnimeList (MAL) Client ID for third-party list integration (optional - get at: https://myanimelist.net/apiconfig)

Config.Name: Tautulli API Key
Config.Description: Tautulli API key for dashboard analytics (optional)

Config.Name: Tautulli URL
Config.Description: URL of your selfhosted Tautulli instance (optional)

Config.Name: Seerr URL
Config.Description: URL for your selfhosted Seerr (Jellyseerr/Overseerr) instance (optional)

Config.Name: Config File Path
Config.Description: Path to config file (default is recommended)

Config.Name: Log Directory
Config.Description: Directory for application logs (default is recommended)
